meta.description: Bulk listing generator for Wax | Wane. Accepts JSON or CSV input, produces Amazon and Walmart bulk-template CSVs with Clinical Glow / Quiet Luxury copy. Brand suffix " | Wax | Wane" is appended only to titles in the HARAMOON skincare line.
